effect_families.label: Offense
effect_families.definition: Effects that directly pressure health totals or raise future damage output.

effect_families.label: Defense
effect_families.definition: Effects that prevent damage, add protection, or reduce incoming or outgoing damage.

effect_families.label: Control
effect_families.definition: Effects that limit enemy actions or apply rule-level restrictions.

effect_families.label: Sustain
effect_families.definition: Effects that restore health or keep a character active over longer fights.

effect_families.label: Resource
effect_families.definition: Effects that grant, steal, or otherwise manipulate chakra-like resources and similar gains.

effect_families.label: State
effect_families.definition: Effects that apply, remove, or modify persistent states without cleanly fitting damage/heal buckets.

effect_families.label: Setup
effect_families.definition: Effects that unlock, replace, or improve other skills and future actions.

effect_families.label: Uncertainty
effect_families.definition: Fallback or ambiguity buckets that must be surfaced instead of guessed away.

skill_classes.label: Instant
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label captured directly from the canonical skill card.

skill_classes.label: Physical
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label for physical-type skills.

skill_classes.label: Unique
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label indicating the skill is marked unique by the canonical source.

skill_classes.label: Chakra
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label for chakra-type skills.

skill_classes.label: Ranged
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label for ranged skills.

skill_classes.label: Melee
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label for melee skills.

skill_classes.label: Mental
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label for mental-type skills.

skill_classes.label: Affliction
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label for affliction-type skills.

skill_classes.label: Action
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label marking action-type skills.

skill_classes.label: Harmful
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label marking harmful skills.

skill_classes.label: Helpful
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label marking helpful skills.

skill_classes.label: Control
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label marking control-oriented skills.

skill_classes.label: Passive
skill_classes.definition: Source-provided skill class label marking passive skills.

effect_types.label: Damage
effect_types.definition: Direct health loss on the described target.
effect_types.inference_notes: Use target_shape subtags only when targeting is structured; otherwise keep only the broad damage tag.

effect_types.label: Increase Damage
effect_types.definition: Raises damage dealt by another skill or future attack window.
effect_types.inference_notes: Treat as setup or burst support, not standalone pressure, unless paired with direct damage evidence.

effect_types.label: Reduce Damage
effect_types.definition: Reduces damage taken or lowers damage output, depending on the target described by the effect.
effect_types.inference_notes: Target-specific protection tags are safe only when the target is structured as self, ally, or all allies.

effect_types.label: Protect
effect_types.definition: Protection-style effect such as invulnerability, destructible defense, shielding, or similar protective language.
effect_types.inference_notes: This bucket is broader than invulnerability alone; inspect raw text when exact protection semantics matter.

effect_types.label: Stun
effect_types.definition: Prevents or limits skill use for the stated duration.
effect_types.inference_notes: Current normalization does not split partial and full stun variants; downstream use should inspect evidence text when needed.

effect_types.label: Apply State
effect_types.definition: Broad parser bucket for applied rules or states such as cannot be countered, invisibility, or other persistent constraints.
effect_types.inference_notes: This bucket is intentionally broad and should not be mistaken for a single canonical mechanic family.

effect_types.label: Heal
effect_types.definition: Restores health to the target described by the effect.
effect_types.inference_notes: Magnitude can stay partial when the text scales from current health thresholds or other conditions.

effect_types.label: Remove State
effect_types.definition: Broad parser bucket for removing chakra, buffs, afflictions, defense, or other existing states.
effect_types.inference_notes: Do not assume every remove_state entry is chakra denial; check evidence when exact removal type matters.

effect_types.label: Gain
effect_types.definition: Broad parser bucket for gaining chakra, defense, or other beneficial recurring value.
effect_types.inference_notes: This bucket may mix direct resource gain with other beneficial gain text; keep the tag broad.

effect_types.label: Drain
effect_types.definition: Broad parser bucket for drain, steal, absorb, or drain-setup text.
effect_types.inference_notes: Some drain entries describe setup or replacement text instead of already-resolved drain output.

effect_types.label: Conditional
effect_types.definition: Setup text that unlocks, replaces, improves, or otherwise changes later skills or later turns.
effect_types.inference_notes: Treat this as an enabler or transform bucket, not proof of immediate output by itself.

effect_types.label: Unknown
effect_types.definition: Fallback effect bucket when current heuristics cannot safely classify the text further.
effect_types.inference_notes: Must be surfaced as uncertainty; downstream logic should inspect raw text and not invent a cleaner type.

condition_types.label: Previous Skill
condition_types.definition: The effect applies only while or after a referenced skill has been used or is active.

condition_types.label: Requires State
condition_types.definition: The effect depends on a described threshold or state that is not fully resolved to a reusable normalized reference.

mission_requirement_types.label: Win With Character
mission_requirement_types.definition: Objective requires winning a number of battles with a named character or character group condition.

mission_requirement_types.label: Streak
mission_requirement_types.definition: Objective requires consecutive wins before the counter resets.

mission_requirement_types.label: Use Skill
mission_requirement_types.definition: Objective requires activating a specific skill a stated number of times.

mission_requirement_types.label: Unknown
mission_requirement_types.definition: Objective text is unavailable in the captured mission detail snapshot and must remain explicit unknown state.

effect.label: Effect Target Unknown
effect.definition: Parser could not safely resolve a structured target for the effect text.

effect.label: Effect Type Heuristic
effect.definition: Effect type was inferred heuristically rather than from a cleaner parser match.

effect.label: Effect Magnitude Unknown
effect.definition: Parser could not safely extract a structured numeric magnitude from the effect text.

effect.label: Effect Fallback Unknown
effect.definition: No structured heuristic matched the effect text, so the effect stays in the explicit unknown bucket.

mission.label: Objective Text Missing
mission.definition: Mission objective text was unavailable in the captured snapshot.

mission.label: Detail Payload Redirect
mission.definition: Mission detail route returned a redirect-shaped payload instead of the expected mission detail body.

mission.label: Detail Payload Error Page
mission.definition: Mission detail route resolved to an error page payload, so the objective stays unknown.

mission.label: Detail Payload Unexpected Home
mission.definition: Mission detail route fell back to the site home payload instead of a mission detail payload.

mission.label: Character Group Not Modeled
mission.definition: Objective names a character group in text, but the current normalized mission contract does not model that group as explicit character refs.

mission.label: Multi Character Condition Not Structured
mission.definition: Objective mentions multiple characters or a compound character condition that stays preserved only in free text.

mission.label: Character Subject Not Resolved
mission.definition: Objective names a character subject that could not be resolved into a normalized character ref.

mission.label: Skill Reference Not Resolved
mission.definition: Objective names a skill that could not be safely resolved into a normalized skill ref.
